answer_json.answer: 命中超预算异常。报销记录R000079属于投资银行部(D001),该部门年度预算为230395.17元,但已审批报销累计金额达363614.58元,已达到并超过年度预算额度的1.0倍(约1.58倍)。按预算管理办法,部门费用累计使用达到年度预算1.0倍后原则上不得继续报销,确需超预算支出的须履行专项审批。R000079为已审批记录且special_approval为0,即未经专项审批,因此命中超预算异常。

final_text:
Based on my analysis:

- Record R000079 belongs to department D001 (投资银行部), amount 226.98, status approved, special_approval = 0.
- D001 annual budget is 230395.17, but cumulative approved reimbursement is 363614.58, which is about 1.58x the budget — well over the 1.0x threshold.
- Per policy, once cumulative usage reaches 1.0x of the annual budget, no further reimbursement is allowed without special approval; R000079 has no special approval, so it hits the over-budget anomaly.
